Blog · Field notes & build logs

Notes from the workshop

Writing from inside real projects: design decisions, engineering trade-offs, and the tools we shipped along the way. No recycled listicles, just receipts.

Article of the day

Building Sprite - a chat widget with two brains

July 16, 2026·5 min read·Luis

How we built a zero-dependency site guide that answers from an LLM when it can and from a pattern engine when it can't, on a static site with no backend and no keys in the repo.

Read the article →

Worth your time

open-source

Rev Log - why the data format is the product

Our open source motorcycle telemetry project ships a ride-data format before it ships hardware. The reasoning behind that order, and what it changes about everything else.

July 15, 2026·5 min read
tools

A tool you can download and own

Our QR code generator is one HTML file that works offline forever. The engineering and the ethics of building tools people can take with them.

July 14, 2026·4 min read
